note: Pinned pricing snapshot for the Phase 3 feasibility batch-1 delivery. All four billed token classes per provider/model, USD per million tokens (usd_per_mtok). Prices retrieved from published pricing pages on the date below; confirm at CP-SPEND. Provider keys and model/selector keys MUST match manifest/delivery-manifest.yaml exactly (costing.py keys prices[providers][provider][model_or_selector]).

sources.basis: Anthropic published list rates (Vertex global-endpoint tracks these; regional/multi-region endpoints add a documented +10% premium — see regional_premium note per model).

Google Cloud Vertex AI generative-ai pricing, global tier. cache_read = published cached-input price; cache_write = base input rate (Gemini bills cache-creation tokens as standard input on first pass; no separate per-token write premium is published).

claude-sonnet-4-6@default.regional_premium_note: us-central1 (regional) adds +10% over these global-endpoint list rates per Anthropic/GCP docs: input 3.30, cache_write 4.125, cache_read 0.33, output 16.50. Confirm endpoint choice (global vs regional) at CP-SPEND.

claude-haiku-4-5@20251001.regional_premium_note: us-central1 (regional) adds +10%: input 1.10, cache_write 1.375, cache_read 0.11, output 5.50.

Gemini 3.5 Flash (High).selector_note: Product B verbatim selector label. '(High)' is a reasoning-effort tier that raises token VOLUME (reasoning billed as output), not the per-token rate. Priced at Gemini 3.5 Flash global rates. Only used if Product B exposes token counts (proxy_observed); otherwise cost is recorded unavailable, never zero.

Gemini 3.1 Pro (High).selector_note: Product B verbatim selector label. Priced at Gemini 3.1 Pro global rates; cache_read is the <=200K cached-input price (>200K is 0.40). '(High)' affects volume, not rate.
